title: Realistic PVP
body:
# Realistic PvP

The Modpack that makes Minecraft ten times more intense to play!  This Modpack includes mods like Enhanced Visuals to make your combat more realistic and First Person Model which makes it so that you can see your player model, and other mods to enhance Minecraft for better or for worse. 

**Disclaimer! The Mod Physics Mod might cause your game to crash if you don't configure it to make it lower resolution, you might also have to either completely disable Physics Mod or Disable Sodium for ragdoll physics to work.**

But if you have a super beffy computer than you might not have to make those changes.
